title: Majrusz Library
description: Library with common code for some of my modifications.
body:
Library with common code used by my other modifications: \ [Majrusz's Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/mod/majruszs-enchantments) v1.0.0+ \ [Majrusz's Progressive Difficulty](https://modrinth.com/mod/majruszs-progressive-difficulty) v0.4.0+ \ [Majrusz's Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/majruszs-accessories)
